name: Proactivity
description: Governance envelope, durable goals, and cadence for a proactive OpenClaw agent.

perTickCap.description: Max governed actions per tick bucket before further ones are denied.

governedTools.description: Tool names to gate via before_tool_call. Outbound messages are always governed.

tickSeconds.description: Width of a tick bucket in seconds — the scope of the per-tick cap and idempotency.

recentContactThreshold.description: Soft-cap: hold a send after this many recent contacts to the same recipient.

dryRun.description: Record actions as pending instead of allowing them.

sessionKey.description: Session to route proactive cron ticks into (for set_cadence).

entityId.description: Governance scope; leave as-is for a single personal agent.
